notes:
Seti Astro Suite Pro

V1.17.1
Fixes caching of GAIA data for future use, fixes cancellation crash during gaia download, incorporates post fixes.

V1.17.0
New Function: Narrowband Channel Extractor (NBExtract) — found under Functions.
NBExtract allows OSC users with any dual-band narrowband filter to extract clean, separated Ha and OIII (or SII, Hβ, or custom line) channels directly from their image. Rather than relying on manufacturer QE curves — which are often promotional approximations — NBExtract empirically fits a 3×2 mixing matrix from the actual stellar flux in your image, calibrated against Pickles spectral templates and real Gaia XP spectra. Your stars, your optical train, your data, no guessing. The extraction strength is automatically regularised from the matrix condition number so over-subtraction is handled without any manual tuning, and a stellar flux color mixing fallback handles edge cases where full matrix inversion isn't possible. Requires your image to be plate solved, stacking artifacts cropped out, gradients removed, and linear.

Other minor bug and UX fixes.
